raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves gently left ahead, waypoint delta is +5.44° indicating a slight left correction needed, so applying minimal left steering at full speed.
knowledge: Track has a left-curving section around waypoints 55-75, heading southwest then west
Car is consistently near center (~0.01-0.14m) and well within safe margin
Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves
Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections

Car is maintaining 1.5 speed well through this section
